# Miroslav Novotný
Full-stack Developer & Student IT

## Summary
I am an enthusiastic IT student aiming for ČVUT FIT with experience in full-stack development. I specialize in Next.js, Java (Spring Boot), and Rust. I am proficient in working with relational databases (SQL), Python scripting, and Linux administration.

## Technical Skills
- **Frontend**: Next.js, React, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS
- **Backend**: Java (Spring Boot), Rust (Leptos, Wasm), Node.js, Python
- **Databases**: PostgreSQL, MySQL/MariaDB, Redis
- **DevOps/Other**: Linux (Administration), Docker, Git, AI tools

## Key Projects
- **Expertov**: Production SaaS platform built with Next.js, tRPC, Drizzle ORM, PostgreSQL, and Redis.
- **Vyhledávač Adres (RÚIAN)**: Address search engine with full-text indexing built in Rust/Wasm with MariaDB.
- **Simple Impostor Game**: Modern PWA implementation of a party game in React/Tailwind.
- **Fractal Generator**: Mathematical rendering engine (Barnsley fern) built in Rust.
- **Flashscore Scraper**: Microservice for data extraction from Flashscore.

- **Location**: Prague, Czech Republic

## Availability
Available for remote and on-site collaborations. Focus on high-performance applications and scalable systems.

## Freelance
I am available for freelance work. I specialize in full-stack development with a focus on Next.js, Java (Spring Boot), and Rust. I am also proficient in working with relational databases (SQL), Python scripting, and Linux administration.
I can create a website for you or a web application. I can also help you with your existing project. I am a quick learner and can pick up new technologies quickly. I am also a team player and can work well in a team environment.
